description: Canonical physical security components library. Components are abstract building blocks that describe WHAT exists, not HOW it is implemented.

components.name: Security Governance Personnel
components.description: Personnel with designated responsibility for security governance and oversight.

components.name: Security Policy Document
components.description: Written security policy or equivalent statement that establishes security expectations.

components.name: Incident Reporting Process
components.description: Documented process for reporting security incidents.

components.name: Video Camera
components.description: Fixed or movable devices used to capture video imagery.

components.name: Video Recording Device
components.description: Devices used to store or manage recorded video footage.

components.name: Monitoring Workstation
components.description: Workstations used to view and monitor video feeds.

components.name: Intrusion Sensor
components.description: Devices that detect unauthorized entry or intrusion.

components.name: IDS Control Panel
components.description: Central unit that receives, processes, and reports intrusion signals.

components.name: Access Control Reader
components.description: Devices that read credentials to grant or deny access.

components.name: Access Control Controller
components.description: Central unit that processes access requests and controls access points.

components.name: Access Control Lock
components.description: Electronic or mechanical locks controlled by access control systems.

components.name: Perimeter Fence
components.description: Barriers that define and protect facility perimeter boundaries.

components.name: Perimeter Gate
components.description: Controlled access points through perimeter barriers.

components.name: Perimeter Barrier
components.description: Physical barriers including bollards, barriers, and other perimeter protection measures.

components.name: Security Lighting Fixture
components.description: Lighting fixtures used for security illumination of facilities and perimeters.

components.name: Interior Barrier
components.description: Physical barriers used to protect assets and people inside facilities.

components.name: Security Radio
components.description: Radio communication devices used by security personnel.

components.name: Notification System
components.description: Systems used to notify personnel of security events or emergencies.

components.name: Monitoring Center
components.description: Central location for monitoring security systems and coordinating response.

components.name: Security Guard
components.description: Personnel assigned to security duties including patrols, posts, and response.
